message:
Fix workflow to trigger testing on all Copilot PRs

Remove the draft-only restriction from the runtime testing step.
Now Copilot will be prompted to test after every Netlify success,
regardless of whether the PR is draft or ready for review.

Also adjusts Step 4 messaging based on PR draft status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -189,20 +189,31 @@ jobs:
           echo "Preview URL: $PREVIEW_URL"
 
       - name: Request Copilot to test preview
-        if: steps.pr_info.outputs.is_copilot == 'true' && steps.pr_info.outputs.is_draft == 'true'
+        if: steps.pr_info.outputs.is_copilot == 'true'
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: |
           PR_NUM="${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}"
           ISSUE_NUM="${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.issue_number }}"
           PREVIEW_URL="${{ steps.preview.outputs.preview_url }}"
 
+          IS_DRAFT="${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.is_draft }}"
+
           # Get the issue body for test context
           ISSUE_BODY=""
           if [ -n "$ISSUE_NUM" ]; then
             ISSUE_BODY=$(gh api repos/${{ github.repository }}/issues/$ISSUE_NUM --jq '.body' | head -1000)
           fi
 
+          # Build step 4 based on draft status
+          if [ "$IS_DRAFT" == "true" ]; then
+            STEP4="#### Step 4: Mark Ready for Review
+          Only after ALL tests pass, mark PR as ready for review."
+          else
+            STEP4="#### Step 4: Confirm Ready for Merge
+          Reply confirming all tests pass and the PR is ready for final review."
+          fi
+
           # Use heredoc for multiline comment to avoid YAML escaping issues
           gh pr comment "$PR_NUM" --repo "${{ github.repository }}" --body "$(cat <<EOF
           ## ✅ Build Successful - Preview Ready
@@ -240,8 +251,7 @@ jobs:
           - List of any issues found and how you fixed them
           - Confirmation that all tests pass
 
-          #### Step 4: Mark Ready for Review
-          Only after ALL tests pass, mark PR as ready for review.
+          $STEP4
 
           ### Original Issue Requirements
           $ISSUE_BODY
